ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from a reference point */,
  "num_schools" INTEGER /* Number of schools in the city */,
  "statewide_rank" TEXT /* Statewide rank of the city */,
  "rank" REAL /* Rank of the city (0-5) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the city */,
  "average_household_income" REAL /* Average household income in the city */,
  "median_house_price" REAL /* Median house price in the city */,
  "education_spending" REAL /* Education spending in the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in rank from the previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the school is located */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., public, private) */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Enrollment number of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "enrollment_trend" TEXT /* Trend in enrollment over time */,
  "test_scores" REAL /* Average test scores for the school */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate of the school */,
  "teacher_student_ratio" REAL /* Teacher to student ratio */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the school */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of account creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistic */,
  "test_scores" REAL /* Average test scores for the school */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate of the school */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Enrollment number of the school */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the school */,
  "teacher_student_ratio" REAL /* Teacher to student ratio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_statistics_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
column_names: Number of schools in the city
Average household income in the city
Median house price in the city
Change in rank from the previous year
ID of the city where the school is located
Average test scores for the school
Unique identifier for each statistic entry
Average test scores for the school
